title: Bridging Education and Industry
description: Text analysis of course descriptions and job descriptions to identify the skill overlap between curriculum taught at the university level and what is demanded from the industry.

title: Advanced Emergency Alert
description: An advanced version of existing emergency alert systems that delivers short-form videos to teens and young adults to emphasize disaster situational awareness and clear evacuation guidances.

title: Is Your Heart Racing?
description: Scrolly-telling interactive data visualization where users can explore the different heart rate patterns during emergency surgery procedures through individual patient cases.

title: Surgery Time!! How long will your luxury stay be?
description: An interactive data visualization where users can explore hospital stay lengths, filtering based on the part of the body being operated on, procedure type, and genders.
